parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS signals (
    id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    session_date    DATE NOT NULL,
    ticker          VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    company_name    TEXT,
    market          VARCHAR(5),
    type            VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,
    confidence      INTEGER,
    entry_low       DECIMAL(10,2),
    entry_high      DECIMAL(10,2),
    take_profit     DECIMAL(10,2),
    stop_loss       DECIMAL(10,2),
    suggested_shares INTEGER,
    estimated_cost  DECIMAL(10,2),
    upside_pct      DECIMAL(5,2),
    downside_pct    DECIMAL(5,2),
    risk_reward     DECIMAL(5,2),
    potential_profit DECIMAL(10,2),
    potential_loss  DECIMAL(10,2),
    risk_level      VARCHAR(10),
    reasoning       TEXT,
    catalysts       JSONB,
    educational_note TEXT,
    risk_warnings   JSONB,
    price_data      JSONB,
    news_data       JSONB,
    session_budget  DECIMAL(10,2),
    is_top_pick     BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trades (
    id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    session_date    DATE NOT NULL,
    signal_id       INTEGER REFERENCES signals(id),
    ticker          VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    buy_price       DECIMAL(10,2),
    sell_price      DECIMAL(10,2),
    quantity        INTEGER,
    pnl_amount      DECIMAL(10,2),
    pnl_pct         DECIMAL(5,2),
    outcome         VARCHAR(10),
    hit_take_profit BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    hit_stop_loss   BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    exited_early    BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    feedback_tags   JSONB,
    notes           TEXT,
    closed_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS insights (
    id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    week_start      DATE NOT NULL,
    trades_analyzed INTEGER,
    win_rate        DECIMAL(5,2),
    insights        JSONB,
    adjustments     JSONB,
    summary         TEXT,
    raw_stats       JSONB
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_signals_session ON signals(session_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_signals_ticker ON signals(ticker);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trades_session ON trades(session_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trades_ticker ON trades(ticker);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trades_outcome ON trades(outcome);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_insights_week ON insights(week_start);

-- Add columns if upgrading from older schema
ALTER TABLE signals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS risk_level VARCHAR(10);
ALTER TABLE signals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS potential_profit DECIMAL(10,2);
ALTER TABLE signals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS potential_loss DECIMAL(10,2);
ALTER TABLE signals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS risk_warnings JSONB;
